_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: Following 7 days of sustained cabozantinib treatment, there was a shift in the functional kinome profile predominated by loss of MIB binding of a small number of kinases including MET, DDR1, DDR2, and AXL
details: Used for mass spectrometry based kinome profiling to identify kinases associated with cabozantinib anti-tumor activity, revealing loss of MIB binding of MET, DDR1, DDR2, and AXL after 7 days of treatment
